reason: ISS-1791 asks for a verifiable artifact (commit SHA, file path, raw-text snippet) supporting the claim that monitor.py hardcodes WIN-026's expected and observed values to the same 5,733 km parameter. Verifying this requires fetching the dome's monitor.py source from john09289.github.io or GitHub. raw-text/08-live-power.txt does not include a crepuscular-ray domain entry, so the specific domain number and hardcoded values are not in our local cache. wins.json WIN-026 detail_verdict_text states the claim; the code_analysis tag 'monitoring-hardcoded' is set. But ISS-1791 wants a citable line/domain number. Escalating to Opus analyst for web fetch of dome repo to confirm exact monitor.py domain structure for WIN-026.
